name: csoai-governance-crosswalk-mcp
description: Csoai Governance Crosswalk MCP server. Tools: query crosswalk, crosswalk bridge, compliance gap analysis. Built by MEOK AI Labs.

tools.name: query_crosswalk
tools.description: Query the CSOAI crosswalk mapping for a specific framework.

tools.name: crosswalk_bridge
tools.description: Bridge two frameworks through CSOAI — the killer feature.

tools.name: compliance_gap_analysis
tools.description: Identify compliance gaps across multiple frameworks.

tools.name: get_unified_crosswalk
tools.description: Return the CSOAI Master Unified Crosswalk showing all 12 frameworks mapped together.

tools.name: search_by_topic
tools.description: Search across all crosswalks by topic.

tools.name: list_frameworks
tools.description: List all supported frameworks with metadata.

tools.name: generate_compliance_report
tools.description: Generate a compliance requirements report for an organization.

tools.name: get_partnership_charter
tools.description: Return the CSOAI Partnership Charter information.
